label: verified_shortcut
rationale: Deep link intent reliably skips feed traversal on API 35. Verified across 8 replays with 87.5% success rate.

label: needs_human_review
rationale: ADB setText bypasses IME input method. Instagram may not detect the change event, preventing save button activation. Needs manual verification on current app version.

label: drift_prone
rationale: Save confirmation toast timing varies between 800-2200ms. 2 drift incidents in 8 replays. Stable enough for reuse but should use generous wait timeout.

label: safe_for_automation
rationale: Triple-click to select display name field is a standard UI pattern. No risk of data loss or unintended side effects.
